debug_info.goal:
V : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
G H : Ω → SimpleGraph V
p q : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hG : @SimpleGraph.IsBinomialRandom V Ω m G p P
hY : @SimpleGraph.IsBinomialRandom V Ω m H q P
⊢ AEMeasurable (fun ω => G ω ⊓ H ω) P

proof:
by
    obtain ⟨G', hG'm, hG'eq⟩ := hG.aemeasurable
    obtain ⟨H', hH'm, hH'eq⟩ := hY.aemeasurable
    refine ⟨fun ω => G' ω ⊓ H' ω, ?_, ?_⟩
    · rw [measurable_iff_adj]
      intro u v
      simp only [inf_adj]
      exact (measurable_iff_adj.mp hG'm u v).and (measurable_iff_adj.mp hH'm u v)
    · filter_upwards [hG'eq, hH'eq] with ω hGω hHω
      rw [hGω, hHω]
successful_attempts:
by
    obtain ⟨G', hG'm, hG'eq⟩ := hG.aemeasurable
    obtain ⟨H', hH'm, hH'eq⟩ := hY.aemeasurable
    refine ⟨fun ω => G' ω ⊓ H' ω, ?_, ?_⟩
    · rw [measurable_iff_adj]
      intro u v
      simp only [inf_adj]
      exact (measurable_iff_adj.mp hG'm u v).and (measurable_iff_adj.mp hH'm u v)
    · filter_upwards [hG'eq, hH'eq] with ω hGω hHω
      rw [hGω, hHω]
